original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: International Society for Holter and Noninvasive Electrocardiology and Heart Rhythm Society
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: 2017 ISHNE-HRS expert consensus statement on ambulatory ECG and external cardiac monitoring/telemetry
original_registry_entry.population: Adults and selected paediatric patients requiring ambulatory ECG or external cardiac monitoring for symptom-rhythm correlation or defined clinical indications.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Outpatient and ambulatory rhythm evaluation, monitor selection, recording, analysis, and clinician result review.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting symptoms, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, monitor type and duration context, recording quality, and clinician review of Holter or ambulatory ECG data. It is old and does not generate a rhythm diagnosis, monitor order, treatment, or referral.

exact_sections.heading: Section 3.1.6 - selection of appropriate ambulatory ECG technology
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician selection and documentation of monitoring technology based on symptom frequency, diagnostic power, recording duration, patient acceptance, and recording quality; it does not order a device automatically.

exact_sections.heading: Sections 4.1-4.2 - syncope and palpitations
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports symptom history, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, clinical context, and ambulatory ECG review for syncope or palpitations without concluding causation.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations table - selection of ambulatory ECG
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting monitor type and duration in relation to symptom frequency and recording window; treatment and diagnosis are outside scope.

title: 2017 ISHNE-HRS expert consensus statement on ambulatory ECG and external cardiac monitoring/telemetry
publisher: International Society for Holter and Noninvasive Electrocardiology and Heart Rhythm Society
population: Adults and selected paediatric patients requiring ambulatory ECG or external cardiac monitoring for symptom-rhythm correlation or defined clinical indications.
intended_setting: Outpatient and ambulatory rhythm evaluation, monitor selection, recording, analysis, and clinician result review.
access_limitations: One or more PDF tables require structured extraction
Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
